html: Kommunfullmäktige Kommunstyrelsen Diarienummer: KS 2026-3 Reg.datum: 2026-01-01 Utskriftsdatum: 2026-05-12 Tillkomst: In In/Ut-datum: 2026-01-01 Sekretess: Nej Rubrik: Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige Beskrivning: Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige Handläggare: Antonia Berglund Avdelning: Verksamhetskod: Ärendetyp: 2.4.1 Hantera och registrera allmänna handlingar Handlingsnr Tillkomst Reg.datum In/Ut datum Handl. typ Rubrik Initierare: Handlingar: KS 2026-3-5 Upprättad 2026-04-16 2026-04-16 Inkommen post för kännedom och information 2.4.1 Rapportering enligt 16 kap. 6 h § SoL av ej verkställda beslut 2025-10-01 – 2025-12-31 KS 2026-3-6 Upprättad 2026-05-12 2026-05-12 Protokollsutdrag ¤ §70 KF Meddelanden - anmäls i kommunfullmäktige KS 2026-3-7 In 2026-05-12 2026-04-27 Övrig diarieförd handling 2.4.1 Meddelanden till kommunfullmäktige from 2026-01-28 t om 2026-04-09
tldr: This document outlines the various reports and notifications that the Norrtälje municipal council has received, which are intended to keep them informed. The information presented primarily concerns matters that do not require any new decisions.
lattlast:
In this meeting held in May 2026, the politicians on the municipal council reviewed various reports. One of the reports concerned decisions that had not been implemented during the latter part of 2025. This report relates to the Social Services Act, which is the law governing how the municipality should provide support and care to people in need.

Other documents and excerpts from previous meetings were also received. These documents were sent to the municipality to keep the politicians informed about the progress of the municipality's work.

None of the information presented indicates the allocation of new funds or the commencement of new construction projects. It is simply information that has been recorded in the municipality's system to document what has happened during the year.
